concerns.text: T029 mentions 'sensitivity analysis sweeps' but lacks a specific task to generate the mandatory 'sensitivity report' artifact required by SC-005. The spec demands a documented output showing how findings change across cutoff ranges; T029 only describes the computation logic, not the artifact generation.

T007 creates a 'skeleton' for quality_check.py, but the spec (Edge Cases, FR-002) requires full implementation of FD computation and subject exclusion logic before Phase 3 can proceed. A skeleton does not satisfy the acceptance criterion of excluding subjects with >10% high-motion volumes.

SC-002 requires findings to be framed as ASSOCIATIONAL or CAUSAL based on randomization status. No task exists to generate the 'results/statistical_framing.md' artifact or implement logic in stats.py to output this framing. This is a missing deliverable for a mandatory success criterion.

SC-004 requires documentation of sample size and power considerations for n≥20 subjects. T029 handles effect sizes but no task is assigned to generate the 'results/power_analysis.md' or equivalent artifact documenting power limitations as required by the spec.

FR-009 and Edge Cases require checkpointing logic to handle 6-hour runtime limits and disk overflow. T008 mentions 'checkpointing logic' but T009 only covers disk quota enforcement. The specific implementation of resumption from last completed stage (required by Edge Cases) is not explicitly assigned to a task.
